# OpenStory

> Multi-scene AI video production. Open source and free to self-host.

OpenStory is an open source AI video production platform. Describe an idea or paste a script, and it builds scenes, casts characters, generates shots, and scores music — all from one interface.

## Key Features

- **Script-to-Screen Pipeline**: Describe what you want in a line or paste a full script. OpenStory breaks it into scenes, generates shots, and scores the music.
- **Consistent Characters & Locations**: Define your characters and environments once — age, wardrobe, lighting, architecture. Consistency is maintained across every shot.
- **Latest AI Models**: Access the best image and video models as they ship. Switch per shot, or let OpenStory pick.
- **Music & Audio**: Generate music tracks and sound effects that match your sequence.
- **Full Export**: Download individual shots, export full sequences, and get the prompts behind every generation.

## Open Source

- **License**: MIT
- **Repository**: https://github.com/openstory-so/openstory
- **Self-Hosting**: Free to self-host with full functionality

## Pricing

No subscriptions. No markup on model costs. You pay exactly what the AI providers charge — nothing more. Bring your own API keys on the managed site or self-host for full control.

## Links

- Website: https://openstory.so
- App: https://app.openstory.so
- GitHub: https://github.com/openstory-so/openstory
- License: https://github.com/openstory-so/openstory/blob/main/LICENSE
